description: The sequel to Nature's Journey that takes exploration to new heights!

In Nature's Journey: Beyond the Horizon, the focus is on pushing the boundaries of creativity and gameplay. From awe-inspiring aesthetics to groundbreaking automation, get ready to explore uncharted territories, engage in thrilling combat encounters, and establish flourishing colonies and kingdoms.

Nature's Journey: Beyond the Horizon is a gateway to boundless creativity, challenging exploration, and epic kingdom-building. Are you ready to embark on the next chapter of your Minecraft journey? The world awaits your exploration and conquest.
**Remember to press U to open the quest menu!**
